---
title: "The European Union's Approach to Multilingualism in its Own Communication Policy"
sort_year: 2022
year: "2022"
status: "Past"
funder: "European Parliament DG Culture"
categories: [Applied Political Communication, Past]
---

**Year:** 2022
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** European Parliament DG Culture
**Research Cluster:** Applied Political Communication
